title: selaginella rupestris f. schmidtii
intro: Selaginella rupestris f. schmidtii is a rare, carnivorous, and epiphytic species of the Selaginella genus, often referred to as the "mountain spikemoss". This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Chinese medicine, where it's valued for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits associated with Selaginella rupestris f. schmidtii include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to boost the immune system and reduce fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is sometimes combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
